nodes.name: Cinnyris
nodes.summary: Cinnyris（Cinnyris）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联59种鸟类，如綠腹花蜜鳥、Western miombo sunbird、Eastern miombo sunbird等59种鸟类。

nodes.name: Violet-breasted sunbird
nodes.summary: Violet-breasted sunbird（Cinnyris chalcomelas）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Violet-breasted sunbird。

nodes.name: Violet-breasted sunbird
nodes.summary: The violet-breasted sunbird (Cinnyris chalcomelas) is a species of bird in the family Nectariniidae (sunbirds). It is found in Kenya and Somalia. It is sometimes regarded as the same species as the Pemba sunbird. References
